case_title: XIN PING NING VS. MARIA CARLO CAMPOBELLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JAMES PAN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY NING, XIN PING CAMPOBELLO, MARIA CARLO
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT CAMPOBELLO, MARIA CARLO MAILED TO RESPONDENT NING, XIN PING
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2009 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. (CLERK LESLIE GOMEZ, DEPT. 525)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NING, XIN PING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOBELLO, MARIA CARLO $2,609.52 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,669.52, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT AND CAUSED THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NING, XIN PING RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CAMPOBELLO, MARIA CARLO $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $810.00, TOTAL DAMAGES ARE $1300 OUT OF POCKET, PLUS $200 ESTIMATE FOR THE MIRROR, REDUCED BY PLAINTIFF'S OWN NEGLIGENCE. THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT THE TWO VEHICLES WERE NOT A SAFE DISTANCE APART AT THE TIME OF COLLISION. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:00am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called form Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Maria Campobello appears with counsel Kenneth A. Hagemann. Respondent Xin Ping Ning appears in pro per with interpreter James Ping who was duly sworn. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
